name: groq-models
description: Groq LPU inference (OpenAI-compatible), very low latency. Bring your own Groq API key.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Groq API Key
x-meta.help: Your Groq API key. Leave empty to fall back to the GROQ_API_KEY environment variable.

x-meta.label: Default Model
x-meta.help: A Groq model id. Empty = resolved from live /v1/models discovery.

x-meta.label: Base URL
x-meta.help: Optional override of the Groq base URL. Empty uses https://api.groq.com/openai/v1.
